title: WWDC 2026 live updates: Apple AI, Siri and iPhone software in focus
summary: Apple's WWDC 2026 keynote is focusing on AI capabilities, Siri updates, and iPhone software developments, marking what appears to be CEO John Ternus's first major public appearance. The event highlights Apple's commitment to advancing AI and software integration across its ecosystem.
content: Follow Apple WWDC 2026 live updates as the keynote spotlights AI, software, Siri and developer tools and likely CEO John Ternus's first major appearance.

zh.title: WWDC 2026 实时更新：Apple AI、Siri 和 iPhone 软件成为焦点
zh.summary: Apple 的 WWDC 2026 主题演讲聚焦于 AI 功能、Siri 更新和 iPhone 软件开发，这似乎是 CEO John Ternus 首次重大公开亮相。该事件突显了 Apple 在其生态系统中推进 AI 和软件集成的承诺。

title: Why tech’s record pullback is just a ‘healthy reset’ for the bull market, according to Morgan Stanley’s top stock-market strategist
summary: Morgan Stanley's top strategist views the recent significant tech market pullback as a healthy correction rather than a sustained downturn. Improving earnings and economic conditions provide support for continued stock market growth, suggesting the bull market remains intact.
content: Improving earnings and economic backdrop support stocks, says Morgan Stanley’s Wilson.

zh.title: 据摩根士丹利顶级股市策略师称，科技股创纪录下跌只是牛市的"健康调整"
zh.summary: 摩根士丹利的顶级策略师将最近的科技市场大幅下跌视为健康的调整，而非持续的低迷。不断改善的盈利和经济状况为股市继续增长提供了支撑，表明牛市仍然完好无损。

title: USAA to return nearly $1 billion to Florida members as legal reforms help lower insurance costs
summary: USAA is returning nearly $1 billion to its Florida members through a $500 million dividend and other savings, driven by insurance legal reforms that have reduced costs. This significant return demonstrates how regulatory changes can directly benefit policyholders.
content: USAA said it will deliver nearly $1 billion in combined savings and returns to eligible Florida members, including a $500 million dividend, CNBC can exclusively report.

zh.title: 随着法律改革帮助降低保险成本，USAA 向佛罗里达州会员返还近 10 亿美元
zh.summary: USAA 通过 5 亿美元的股息和其他储蓄向佛罗里达州会员返还近 10 亿美元，这是由保险法律改革推动的，该改革降低了成本。这项重大返还表明监管变化如何能直接使保单持有人受益。

title: This Big Tech investor’s warning for traders: Watch out for the SpaceX IPO
summary: Altimeter Capital CEO Brad Gerstner warns that retail investors should be cautious about upcoming big tech IPOs, including SpaceX, as they may face challenging market conditions. His warning highlights potential risks that inexperienced investors may not fully understand.
content: Brad Gerstner, CEO of tech investor Altimeter Capital, said retail investors are facing some potentially tricky times ahead with big tech IPOs.

zh.title: 这位大科技投资者对交易者的警告：小心SpaceX IPO
zh.summary: Altimeter Capital首席执行官Brad Gerstner警告散户投资者应对即将到来的大科技公司IPO（包括SpaceX）保持谨慎，因为他们可能面临具有挑战性的市场条件。他的警告强调了没有经验的投资者可能无法充分理解的潜在风险。

title: The U.S. stock market is facing historic downside risk — these 10 low-volatility stocks can protect your portfolio
summary: With the U.S. stock market facing significant downside risk, low-volatility stocks are emerging as a defensive strategy that can cushion portfolios during market turbulence. These stocks have demonstrated superior risk-adjusted returns compared to the broader market.
content: Low-volatility stocks give investors a smoother ride — and they are beating the market on a risk-adjusted basis.

zh.title: 美国股票市场面临历史性下行风险——这10只低波动性股票可以保护您的投资组合
zh.summary: 随着美国股票市场面临重大下行风险，低波动性股票正成为一种防御性策略，可以在市场动荡期间缓冲投资组合。与更广泛的市场相比，这些股票表现出了更好的风险调整后回报。

title: We're trimming 2 recent winners to raise cash in case of another day like Friday
summary: A portfolio manager is selling positions in two recently outperforming stocks to raise cash and prepare for potential market volatility similar to the decline experienced on Friday. This profit-taking strategy aims to reduce exposure and increase defensive positioning.
content: We're booking some profits in two hot stocks.

zh.title: 我们在减少2只近期赢家以募集现金，以防出现另一个类似周五的日子
zh.summary: 投资组合经理正在出售两只近期表现出色的股票的头寸以募集现金，并为可能出现类似周五经历的市场波动做准备。这种获利回吐策略旨在减少敞口并增加防御性头寸。

title: Weight loss drug maker sinks 25% after new safety data spooks investors
summary: A weight loss drug maker's stock plummeted 25% following release of new safety data concerning side effects, despite the drug meeting its primary efficacy targets. The market's negative reaction reflects concerns about the drug's commercial viability given the safety profile.
content: While the experimental drug met its key targets, analysts are concerned over the commercial opportunity due to side effects.

zh.title: 减肥药制造商在新安全数据公布后股价下跌25%
zh.summary: 一家减肥药制造商在公布新安全数据后股价暴跌25%，尽管该药物达到了主要疗效目标，但新数据引发了对副作用的担忧。市场的负面反应反映了投资者对该药物在安全状况下的商业可行性的担忧。

title: United CEO brushes off airline mergers after American rejection: 'There's nothing'
summary: United Airlines CEO Scott Kirby stated there are no meaningful merger or consolidation opportunities in the airline industry following American Airlines' rejection of a potential deal. His comment suggests the wave of airline consolidation has reached a natural limit.
content: When asked about a wave of consolidation among airlines, Kirby said further combination opportunities look unlikely: "There's nothing."

zh.title: 联合航空CEO在美国航空拒绝后淡化航空合并："什么都没有"
zh.summary: 联合航空CEO斯科特·柯比在美国航空拒绝了一项潜在交易后表示，航空业中没有有意义的合并或整合机会。他的评论表明航空业整合浪潮已经达到了自然极限。

title: Why Elon Musk says ASML is the greatest company in Europe
summary: Elon Musk considers Dutch semiconductor equipment maker ASML the greatest company in Europe due to its critical role in his Terafab manufacturing project in Texas. ASML's advanced lithography machines are essential for Musk's ambitious chip production goals.
content: For Elon Musk’s ambitious Terafab project in Texas to be successful, Musk is going to need  lots of ASML’s industry-leading lithography machines.

zh.title: 为什么埃隆·马斯克称ASML是欧洲最伟大的公司
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克认为荷兰半导体设备制造商ASML是欧洲最伟大的公司，因为它在他位于德州的Terafab制造项目中起着关键作用。ASML的先进光刻机对于马斯克雄心勃勃的芯片生产目标至关重要。

title: Corning shares jump 9% after striking deal to power Amazon AI data centers in U.S.
summary: Corning's stock surged 9% following a major deal with Amazon to supply components for its U.S. AI data centers, reflecting the company's growing importance in the AI infrastructure buildout. The agreement underscores the massive capital investments megacap companies are making in AI.
content: Amazon is the latest megacap company to announce a massive deal with Corning, which is rapidly becoming a critical player in the AI buildout.

zh.title: 康宁与亚马逊达成AI数据中心供电协议后股价上涨9%
zh.summary: 康宁与亚马逊达成为其美国AI数据中心供应组件的重大协议后，股价上涨9%，这反映了该公司在AI基础设施建设中日益重要的地位。该协议强调了科技巨头在AI领域的巨大资本投入。

title: Italian coffee giant Lavazza launches single-serve tablets to make espresso in the U.S.
summary: Italian coffee company Lavazza is introducing Tablì, single-serve espresso tablets in the U.S. market, betting that environmentally conscious consumers prioritize sustainability alongside convenience. This product positions Lavazza to capture market share among sustainability-focused coffee drinkers.
content: With Tablì, Lavazza is betting that sustainability is still a top consideration for many coffee drinkers.

zh.title: 意大利咖啡巨头Lavazza在美国推出单份浓缩咖啡片
zh.summary: 意大利咖啡公司Lavazza在美国市场推出Tablì单份浓缩咖啡片，押注环保意识强的消费者会在便利性之外优先考虑可持续性。这款产品将帮助Lavazza在注重可持续发展的咖啡消费者中争夺市场份额。

title: Iran announces 'end of military operations' against Israel, but warns Lebanon strikes could trigger escalation
summary: Iran announced the end of its military operations against Israel following Sunday night strikes, though it warned that Israeli strikes on Lebanon could trigger renewed escalation. The exchange marks the first major military action since an April ceasefire and raises concerns about regional stability.
content: Iran and Israel traded strikes on Sunday night for the first time since a ceasefire was agreed in April, threatening to torpedo an already-fragile ceasefire.

zh.title: 伊朗宣布对以色列的"军事行动结束"，但警告以色列对黎巴嫩的打击可能引发升级
zh.summary: 伊朗在周日晚间打击后宣布结束其对以色列的军事行动，但警告以色列对黎巴嫩的打击可能引发新的升级。这次交火是四月停火以来首次重大军事行动，引发了人们对地区稳定的担忧。

title: This startup wants to reduce payment friction on prediction markets
summary: EDGE Markets is launching two new products designed to streamline payment processes in prediction markets, addressing a key friction point that has limited mainstream adoption. The new offerings aim to make transactions easier and faster for traders.
content: EDGE Markets is announcing two new products to solve payment issues in prediction markets, the company shared exclusively with CNBC.

zh.title: 这家初创企业希望降低预测市场的支付摩擦
zh.summary: EDGE Markets正在推出两款新产品，旨在简化预测市场的支付流程，解决限制主流采用的关键痛点。这些新产品的目标是使交易者的交易更加便捷和高效。

title: Lib Dems propose energy price discounts for all households
summary: The UK's Liberal Democrats have proposed an energy price discount scheme that would provide an estimated average annual savings of £100 per household. The proposal aims to address the cost-of-living burden households face from energy bills.
content: The party estimates savings of £100-a-year on average for every household under the scheme.

zh.title: 自由民主党提议为所有家庭提供能源价格折扣
zh.summary: 英国自由民主党提出了一项能源价格折扣方案，预计将为每个家庭提供约100英镑的年度平均节省。该提议旨在应对家庭面临的能源账单生活成本负担。

title: Here are Monday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Apple, Micron, SanDisk, Crocs, Cummins, Kontoor Brands & more
summary: This article covers the biggest analyst recommendations and calls on Wall Street for Monday, including updates on major tech and industrial companies like Nvidia, Apple, and Micron. Such analyst calls influence investor sentiment and trading activity across these sectors.
content: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Monday.

zh.title: 周一最大的分析师评级：英伟达、苹果、美光、西数、Crocs、康明斯、Kontoor Brands等
zh.summary: 这篇文章介绍了华尔街周一对英伟达、苹果和美光等主要科技和工业公司的重要分析师评级。分析师评级影响投资者情绪和这些行业的交易活动。

title: Tech stock sell-off accelerates; SoftBank drops 6% as investors sour on AI-linked names
summary: Global tech stocks tracked overnight losses as U.S. markets led by a sell-off in Broadcom, with SoftBank dropping 6%. The decline reflects growing investor concerns about overvaluation in AI-linked companies. The broader sell-off signals potential market skepticism about the sustainability of recent AI-driven gains.
content: Global tech stocks tracked overnight losses in U.S. tech names led by a sell-off in Broadcom.

zh.title: 科技股抛售加速；软银下跌6%，投资者看衰AI概念股
zh.summary: 全球科技股追随隔夜跌势，美国市场由博通抛售领跌，软银下跌6%。这一下跌反映出投资者对AI概念股估值过高的日益担忧。更广泛的抛售表明市场对最近由AI推动的涨幅可持续性存在潜在怀疑。

title: Foreign investors have dumped billions of dollars of Korean stocks this year despite record rally. Here's why
summary: Despite the Kospi emerging as one of the world's standout performers this year, foreign investors have sold billions of dollars in Korean stocks. The selling intensified Monday when the benchmark Kospi plunged over 8% at the open. The divergence between strong performance and foreign investor exits suggests concerns about valuations or longer-term economic outlook.
content: The selling intensified Monday as the benchmark Kospi plunged more than 8% at the open, even as it emerged as one of the world's standout performers thus far.

zh.title: 尽管股市创纪录上涨，外资今年仍抛售数十亿美元韩国股票。原因何在
zh.summary: 尽管KOSPI指数成为今年全球表现最突出的指数之一，外资今年已出售数十亿美元的韩国股票。周一KOSPI指数开盘下跌超过8%，抛售加剧。强劲表现与外资撤出之间的矛盾反映出市场对估值或长期经济前景的担忧。

title: Nvidia strikes a new memory-chip deal as SK Hynix and Samsung shares close with big losses
summary: Nvidia announced a new memory-chip deal as major semiconductor manufacturers SK Hynix and Samsung saw shares decline sharply. South Korea's Kospi index continued falling as enthusiasm for the AI trade cooled. The development reflects shifting dynamics in the chip industry amid market uncertainty.
content: South Korea’s once-hot Kospi index is headed for another day of sharp declines as the AI trade loses steam.

zh.title: 英伟达达成新的存储芯片交易，SK海力士和三星股价大幅下跌
zh.summary: 英伟达宣布达成新的存储芯片交易，主要半导体制造商SK海力士和三星股价大幅下跌。随着AI交易热情冷却，韩国KOSPI指数继续下跌。这一发展反映了芯片行业在市场不确定性中的动态变化。

title: Earthquake of magnitude 7.8 strikes off southern Philippines, tsunami warnings issued
summary: A magnitude 7.8 earthquake struck off Mindanao in the southern Philippines on Monday, triggering tsunami warnings for coastal areas. The significant seismic event posed potential danger to local populations. Authorities issued alerts to protect residents from potential tsunami waves.
content: Tsunami warnings were issued after an earthquake of magnitude 7.8 struck off Mindanao in the southern Philippines on Monday.

zh.title: 菲律宾南部发生7.8级地震，发布海啸警报
zh.summary: 周一，菲律宾南部棉兰老岛附近发生了7.8级地震，引发了沿海地区的海啸警报。这次重大地震事件对当地居民构成了潜在危险。当局发布了警报，以保护居民免受潜在海浪的威胁。

title: Oil prices edge higher after strikes on Israel test ceasefire
summary: Iran launched attacks its first since April ceasefire, threatening further escalation in the Middle East. Oil prices rose in response to renewed regional tensions and the threat of prolonged conflict.
content: Iran said the attacks, its first since an April ceasefire, are the start of "a full week" of strikes

zh.title: 以色列遭袭后油价略涨，停火协议受考验
zh.summary: 伊朗自4月停火以来首次发动袭击，威胁中东局势进一步升级。油价上涨反映了地区紧张局势加剧和长期冲突风险。

title: Hong Kong's IPO boom is developing a performance problem
summary: Hong Kong's IPO market faces growing challenges as companies see stock prices decline after listing despite strong pre-debut performance. This threatens Hong Kong's efforts to compete with Wall Street as a top IPO destination.
content: As Hong Kong vies with Wall Street to be the top IPO market, a growing number of pre-debut runups turn sour after their listing.

zh.title: 香港首次公开募股繁荣面临股价表现问题
zh.summary: 尽管上市前表现强劲，香港IPO市场面临日益增长的挑战，因为公司上市后股价下跌。这威胁到香港与华尔街竞争顶级IPO目的地的努力。

title: Oil prices rise after Iran fires missiles at Israel, escalating regional tensions
summary: Oil prices surged Monday as Iran's missile strikes on Israel escalated Middle East tensions. The heightened conflict raises concerns about prolonged regional instability and energy market disruption.
content: Oil rises on Monday amid heightened tensions in the Middle East, raising concerns that the conflict may drag on.

zh.title: 伊朗向以色列发射导弹后油价上升，地区紧张局势升级
zh.summary: 周一伊朗对以色列的导弹袭击导致油价飙升，升级了中东紧张局势。冲突加剧引发了对长期地区不稳定和能源市场中断的担忧。

title: U.S. stock futures fall as Iran attacks Israel; South Korea's Kospi plunges 8%: Live updates
summary: Iran's attacks on Israel triggered sharp declines in U.S. stock futures and an 8% plunge in South Korea's Kospi index. Markets are also awaiting key inflation data and SpaceX's public debut.
content: Investors will also be focused on inflation data and the public debut of SpaceX on Friday.

zh.title: 伊朗攻击以色列，美股期货下跌；韩国KOSPI指数暴跌8%：实时更新
zh.summary: 伊朗对以色列的攻击引发美国股市期货大幅下滑，韩国KOSPI指数暴跌8%。市场还在等待关键的通胀数据和SpaceX的上市。

title: U.S. stock futures mixed, oil prices surge as new attacks threaten the cease-fire with Iran
summary: U.S. stock futures recovered from initial losses as new Iran tensions threatened the fragile ceasefire, with oil prices surging. Markets remained volatile following Friday's tech-driven selloff.
content: U.S. stock-index futures largely erased initial losses Sunday, after a massive tech selloff on Friday interrupted Wall Street’s two-month rally, and after new developments threatened the fragile cease-fire in the Iran war.

zh.title: 美股期货涨跌不一，油价飙升，新攻击威胁伊朗停火
zh.summary: 随着新的伊朗局势紧张威胁脆弱的停火，美国股市期货从初期损失中恢复，油价飙升。在周五科技股抛售后，市场保持波动。

title: Why AI hyperscalers are now the epicenter of a bear case for stocks
summary: AI hyperscalers have become the focus of bearish investor arguments as capital demands grow faster than returns. The bear case centers on insufficient near-term demand to justify massive ongoing investments. Concerns about AI profitability and sustainability are now influencing broader market sentiment.
content: In the near term, there are many mouths to feed and not enough to eat.

zh.title: 为什么AI超大规模计算企业现在成为股票看空论的中心
zh.summary: 随着资本需求增长快于回报，AI超大规模计算企业成为了看空投资者论点的焦点。看空论点的核心是近期需求不足以证明大规模持续投资的合理性。关于AI盈利能力和可持续性的担忧现在正影响更广泛的市场情绪。
